<!-- indicator: fig-dc-pav -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-dc-pav
#| fig-cap: 'Dutchess County Resident Prevention Agenda Priority Area Voting, 2025'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Dutchess County Resident Prevention Agenda Priority Area Voting, 2025.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-dc-pav", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
